About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for the education sector in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

For more information, please visit the official website.

About the Programme

The UP Gorakhpur ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 is an outsourcing opportunity for 210 posts.

The programme aims to provide education to children in the Gorakhpur district of Uttar Pradesh.
